videos.title: Jizerska 50 - main race 2009
videos.description: Main race - 50 kilometers free technique - of Patria Direct Jizerska 50. January 9-10, 2009, Bedrichov.

videos.title: cross-country skiing in Bedrichov, Jizerske Mountains
videos.description: Cross-country skiing in Bedrichov, Jizerske Mountains, where the annual 50km FIS marathon takes place. Always well prepared tracks! My favourite x-c place.

videos.title: The legend is back with 4 incredible days of ski racing | 58th ČEZ Jizerská 50
videos.description:
🇬🇧  Registration for the 58th ČEZ Jizerská 50 is open! 💛🎉
👉 No inflation - the price remains the same! The best entry fee is available until November 18.
👉 We’ve secured snow insurance again this year, covering 70% of basic entry fees for individual races. Fingers crossed for snow! ❄
👉 Enjoy 4 race days, 8 events, and an exciting program!
👉 Book professional waxing services from SWIX; even for shorter races like the 10 km or 17 km events
See you in Bedřichov!

https://jiz50.cz/en/

videos.title: 52. Jizerska 50 – summary
videos.description: Recap the last Jizerska 50 in our video to find all the important information. 7707 competitors wrote their unique story in February. What will be yours in 2020?

videos.title: Jizerská 50 - secure your place at the start!
videos.description: The tradition, world-class renownand beauty of Jizera Mountains. The legendary 53. ČEZ Jizerská 50 , held from the 7th–9th February 2020 will showcase all of this. Do not miss the 53rd annual traditional cross-country skiing race. You still have a chance to register at the lowest entrance fee possible by the end of September!

videos.title: Jizerska 50 2023 Teaser Movie
videos.description:
The Jizerska 50 is Czech Republic's premium ski race and member of the Worldloppet International Skifederation. Both, amateur skiers and professionals are enjoying the race since years. 

Be part of it and register now:
